smoke_test.description: De Bortoli S² Score-SDE core experiment runs successfully with JAX compatibility patches

compatibility_patches_applied.fix: Added compatibility alias with try/except fallback to typing.Any
Added try/except to import from jax.extend.core or jax._src.core

compatibility_patches_applied.issue: lu.wrap_init() API changed in newer JAX
compatibility_patches_applied.fix: Added try/except to handle both old and new wrap_init signatures
Added try/except to import from jax.extend.core first, fallback to jax.core

test_execution.command: python main.py experiment=s2_toy steps=500 batch_size=32 eval_batch_size=32 warmup_steps=10

notes: The core SDE training loop successfully initializes and runs. Minor plotting API incompatibilities remain but do not affect the algorithmic validation.
